title: FusionModel concatenation projection
content: FusionModel concatenates both hidden branches and applies a trainable projection before the output layer; parameter_count includes this projection.

title: Controlled non-finite failure
content: The failure_nan configuration requests inject_nan and train.run raises FloatingPointError after epoch one with a stable controlled fixture message.

title: Deterministic seed and split
content: The data generator uses numpy default_rng with the configured seed and one deterministic permutation for train validation and test splits.
